text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, my first three years with Vodka come to
a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this doesn't mean our relationship ends here.
There's still so much to work towards in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is goodbye, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you know there's no helpin' it.
Everyone's gotta say goodbye at some point.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the type to cling on forever. I know when
to let go.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Our time runnin' together is over. It is what it is.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's what the passin' wind told me. On our long
road through life, the people we encounter are
but mere passersby.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no end to our battle. Not beyond that
mountain pass... Not beyond that sky...
choice_data_list: ...Did you read that somewhere or something?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Me? R-read?! Hell no! My dad showed it to me from a manga he was readin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In any case, thanks for everythin'. I'll be racin' on
my own from now on.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Adios!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a hammed-up farewell, Vodka runs off,
leaving me somewhat dumbfounded.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Praying for her health and success, I contemplate
what to do next as I return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aaagh, nope, nope, nope! I can't do it! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to see a familiar face running to catch up
with me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No matter how ya think about it, we can't do this!
We can't leave each other!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause of you I've been able to run so cool in
the first place!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Without you, I'd just go back to bein' lame!
choice_data_list: But you made such a cool exit...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I wasn't thinkin' straight! I just got
carried away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You get it, right? Sometimes you're in the
moment and ya just go too fa—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augggh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What I just said... It's exactly the kind of lame
thing Dad always says when he's begging Mom to
forgive him!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is the worst... Trainer, I guess I'm still lame
after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how cool she tries to act, I guess there
are still some things that need refining.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmph! No way we can part ways now! Ya can't leave me like this.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta help me, partner. I need you in my
sidecar forever!
